retry_reason: Failure may be due to probe deferral (-EPROBE_DEFER); caller should retry after the device is ready.
contract_summary: Bulk get wrapper: acquires N reset control references (via __reset_control_get) and stores them in the rstcs array. Each reference increments the underlying refcount. On success, the caller owns all N references and must release each with a corresponding reset_control_put (or use reset_control_bulk_put). On failure (any individual get fails), the function rolls back by calling reset_control_put_internal on any already-acquired controls and returns an error. The caller must check the return value and handle errors appropriately (e.g., retry on -EPROBE_DEFER). The caller must not access the rstc pointers if the function fails.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to acquire multiple reset control references via __reset_control_get and store them in the caller-provided array. The only non-refcount logic is the loop and error rollback.
